project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game (Rising Sun adaptation)
verification_instructions: Run npm run build (tsc -b && vite build) and confirm no errors
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is via TypeScript compilation and Vite build.
key_patterns: Images are imported as ES modules (import imgName from '../img/filename.png'). Figures have a monsterCardId field linking to card IDs like 'sp-daikokuten'. The Figure type has type field (daimyo/bushi/shinto/fortress/monster/kami) and optional monsterCardId. CSS is in a single App.css file. Components use SVG icons from Icons.tsx for figure types. Clan colors come from CLANS constant.
directory_structure: src/components/ - React components, src/types/game.ts - type defs and constants, src/store/gameStore.ts - Zustand store, src/img/ - image assets, src/App.css - all styles
